message:
fix: revert unsafe lock-file deletion, fix TOCTOU race, update WAL test threshold

- Revert acquire_mailbox_activity_lock_for_subject to simple non-destructive
  lock primitive (delete-and-retry could allow dual exclusive locks on
  separate inodes)
- Fix TOCTOU race in cleanup_stale_db_artifacts: delete lock file while
  holding the flock instead of unlock-then-delete
- Update cleanup_empty_wal_sidecar_preserves_nonempty_wal test to use
  64-byte payload (above the new 32-byte WAL header threshold)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
